title: decisions.jsonl row
description: Append-only decision log row. Source of truth: protocols/decision-log.md. Rows live in docs/plans/decisions.jsonl, one JSON object per line.

decision_id.description: D-<phase>-<seq>. Phase is 1, 2, 2.2, etc. Seq is zero-padded >=2 digits.

decision.description: One-line summary of the call made.

reason.description: Max 2 sentences; enforced semantically, not by regex.

revisit_criterion.description: One-sentence natural-language assertion Reality Checker can match against build evidence.

decided_by.description: Free-form agent role string (architect, implementer, design-critic, human, etc.). Not validated against a fixed enum — see protocols/decision-log.md §Schema.

ref.description: Anchor into the artifact backing the decision (e.g., architecture.md#backend/persistence).

related_decision_id.description: Used on finding objects, not decision rows. Listed here so validator accepts rows that reference it explicitly.
